analysis: The project contains multiple versions of a website (docs, github-page, test-website) with incomplete UI implementations. The event.json specifies a black holes theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing files show attempts at cosmic/dark themes but lack cohesive implementation of black hole animations, interactive slides, and animated objects.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including showSlide, Black Hole Quiz functionality, showRandomQuote, and mobile menu toggle functionality. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
Fix the SVG data URL in --black-hole-pattern-5 to include proper SVG content and ensure it is correctly formatted.
